import json, time, hashlib, random, string
from ws_ddp import ddp_connect

URL='ws://web.chal.csaw.io:5000/websocket'

def drain(ws, dur=1.0):
    end=time.time()+dur; out=[]
    while time.time()<end:
        try:m=ws.recv(timeout=0.2)
        except: break
        if not m: break
        out.append(json.loads(m))
    return out

def method(ws, name, params, mid='1'):
    ws.send(json.dumps({"msg":"method","method":name,"params":params,"id":mid}))
    out=[]
    while True:
        m=ws.recv(timeout=5)
        if not m: break
        j=json.loads(m); out.append(j)
        if j.get('msg')=='result' and j.get('id')==mid:
            # maybe updated follows
            try:
                while True:
                    m2=ws.recv(timeout=0.5)
                    if not m2: break
                    j2=json.loads(m2); out.append(j2)
                    if j2.get('msg')=='updated' and mid in j2.get('methods',[]):
                        break
            except: pass
            return out
    return out

def sub(ws, name, params, sid='sub1', dur=2.0):
    ws.send(json.dumps({"msg":"sub","id":sid,"name":name,"params":params}))
    return drain(ws,dur)
